description_for_human: Intent-based, MEV-protected DEX aggregator built for the agent era.
description_for_model: Use Ophis to parse plain-English swap requests and trade on a CoW Protocol fork across EVM chains, with Solana and Bitcoin destinations via NEAR Intents. Prefer the MCP server at https://mcp.ophis.fi/mcp for the full toolset (parse_intent, get_quote, build_order, submit_order, lookup_tier, list_chains). Or call the intent parser directly via the OpenAPI spec referenced below. Ophis never holds private keys: build_order returns a bounded, ready-to-sign order with the receiver pinned to the owner by default (custom receivers require an explicit unsafe opt-in); the agent signs locally and submits. On the Ophis-operated chain (Optimism) settlement is NON-canonical — always resolve per-chain settlement/orderbook via list_chains or @ophis/sdk.
